# The User Engagement Top 100 Report Email Marketing in E-Commerce - Iterable

## The User Engagement Top 100 Report Email Marketing in E-Commerce

We analyzed the email strategies of the top 100 internet retailers in the U.S. to study how they engage their customers.

We note what everyone is doing across the board, as well as what specific companies are doing right and what they can improve.

**Here’s what you’ll find inside:**

*   Onboarding, shopping cart abandonment, blast campaigns
*   Case studies with real-life examples from industry leaders
*   Recommendations on how to make your emails stand out
